1080901.name: Deep Cleaning
1080901.desc: If this unit Critically Hits against targets with Slower Speed than this unit's, inflict 1 additional Potency for negative effects with its Skills (3 times per turn)

1080921.name: Loyal Supporter
1080921.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed attacks a target with [Sinking], deal +0.5% damage for every 1 [Sinking] on target (max 10%)

1080931.name: Loyal Supporter
1080931.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed attacks a target with [Sinking], deal +1% damage for every 1 [Sinking] on target (max 20%)
